sidebar.subtitle: Frontend architecture, design systems and product focus.
sidebar.degreeCore: Core: Java, Python, JS, SQL, Android & Cloud Computing.

automind.h1: Led the modernization of AUTOLOAD (legacy → Next.js 14 + React 18 + TypeScript) with .NET 8 backend, SignalR and multi-tenant PostgreSQL.
automind.h2: Created and publish @automind/react-components — design system with Radix UI, Storybook and Chromatic, consumed by the frontend and KIOSK app.
automind.h3: Built the frontend for AUTOMED (Angular), a measurement management system compliant with ABNT NBR ISO 10012.
automind.h4: Implemented Vitest + Playwright in the Azure DevOps pipeline — smoke tests on PR and full regression on release.
automind.h5: Write specs and requirements docs with stakeholders. Run code reviews and mentor junior devs.

branddi.h1: Architected an End-to-End infringement management solution — REST core (NestJS) with Pipefy integrations via GraphQL.
branddi.h2: Integrated Go (Golang) with RabbitMQ queues to process massive data through Web Crawlers and microservices.
branddi.h3: Set up the observability stack: centralized logging (Papertrail), Healthcheck alerts and Downtime monitoring.
branddi.h4: Managed AWS deployments and automated CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions.
branddi.h5: Led PR approvals and defined the team's unit testing strategy.

eisa.h1: Automated E2E tests with Selenium WebDriver, Cucumber and Ruby for VIVO systems — 90M+ users.
eisa.h2: Validated async flows in Apache Kafka and ran complex PL/SQL (Oracle) scripts on Linux.
eisa.h3: Led the migration from legacy repos (TortoiseSVN → GitLab).

parallel.h1: Built React (frontend) and Node.js (backend) features that improved the platform's sales conversion.
parallel.h2: Created auxiliary Python APIs and managed data persistence in MySQL.

skills.title: Technical Skills
skills.agentSkillsDesc: Skills for coding agents — contributing to the AI-assisted dev ecosystem.
skills.wigDesc: Next.js app with Supabase, Stripe, Sentry, Vitest and Playwright. PWA with service workers.
skills.shadcnIssueDesc: Identified and reported the need for Tailwind v4 upgrade. Issue resolved by the community.
skills.jacosegDesc: Institutional site for a PPE distributor. Next.js, Tailwind and Google Maps.
skills.biancaDesc: Website for a clinical psychologist. Next.js, scheduling and WhatsApp integration.
skills.portfolioDesc: This website. Next.js 16, Tailwind 4, server-side i18n, dynamic PDF and halftone shader.
